hero_description: Jolilab - is a team founded in 2023 that develops various projects, including Discord servers, websites, bots, and much more. We always welcome new members who want to grow in IT and beyond.
chat_msg1_text: Hey! Who wants to play today?
chat_msg2_text: I'm in! Join the voice channel 😄
project_revola_desc: A vanilla Minecraft server without mods from the Jolilab server
project_jolilab2_desc: A new server for playing with friends that didn't take off
project_bot_desc: A bot made for a comfortable experience on the Jolilab server
project_void_desc: Handed over to the Jolilab team by its previous owner
project_devblog_desc: The official Jolilab channel where development updates and spoilers for new projects are posted
socials_subtitle: Follow us and stay in touch with the Jolilab team
social_discord_desc: Chat with the team and members, follow the life of the server
social_telegram_desc: News, development updates and spoilers for new projects
social_support_desc: Support, if you have questions or issues
